faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in a Boerum Hill home?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Boerum Hill homes take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your property and the number of drains affected. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat affected drains with bio-enzymatic cleaners and targeted solutions, and provide you with prevention recommendations. faqs.question: Why are drain flies so common in Boerum Hill buildings?
faqs.answer: Boerum Hill's many historic brownstones and pre-war buildings often have older plumbing systems with organic buildup in pipes, creating perfect breeding grounds for drain flies. The gelatinous film that accumulates in drains provides food and habitat for drain fly larvae. Combined with Brooklyn's humidity and the neighborhood's mix of residential and commercial properties, conditions can be ideal for drain fly populations to thrive.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 drain fly treatment service?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and moisture-prone areas, identification of breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic matter, mechanical cleaning when necessary, application of targeted solutions to eliminate larvae and adults, and detailed prevention advice. The price varies based on property size, severity of infestation, and number of drains requiring treatment.

faqs.question: Can you treat drain flies in Boerum Hill restaurants and commercial spaces?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We provide drain fly treatment for all types of Boerum Hill properties, including the many restaurants, cafes, and businesses along Smith Street and Atlantic Avenue. We offer flexible scheduling, discreet service, and can work during off-hours to minimize disruption to your business operations.
